query:
CREATE TABLE `model_layouts` (
  `id`            INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `unit_id`       INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `header_html`   TEXT,
  `footer_html`   TEXT,
  `preferences`   JSON,
  `is_active`     BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `created_by`    INT NOT NULL,
  `createdAt`     TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt`     TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_model_layouts_unit`
    FOREIGN KEY (`unit_id`) REFERENCES `units`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_model_layouts_user`
    FOREIGN KEY (`created_by`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT
);

ALTER TABLE `audit_log`
MODIFY COLUMN `action` ENUM(
  'LOGIN','LOGOUT','VIEW_STUDY','OPEN_VIEWER',
  'CREATE_REPORT','UPDATE_REPORT','SIGN_REPORT','DELETE_REPORT','REVISE_REPORT',
  'CREATE_USER','UPDATE_USER','DELETE_USER','ACTIVATE_USER','DEACTIVATE_USER',
  'CREATE_UNIT','UPDATE_UNIT','DELETE_UNIT',
  'PACS_QUERY','PACS_DOWNLOAD',
  'CREATE_ANAMNESIS','EDIT_STUDY_METADATA',
  'RESET_DOCTOR_BILLING',
  'CREATE_LAYOUT','UPDATE_LAYOUT','DELETE_LAYOUT'
) NOT NULL;

ALTER TABLE `reports`
ADD COLUMN `layout_snapshot` JSON AFTER `signedBy`;
